Resolutions less than 1278px are not supported

FoodBase PRO+ v0.98+

  • Menu editor
  • Database
  • Settings
  • About
USED HOT KEYS
  • F1 ■ Menu editor / tempates [global]
  • F2 ■ Dish database [global]
  • F3 ■ Settings [global]
  • F4 ■ Add dish [база блюд]
  • F6 ■ Print menu [menu editor]
  • F7 ■ Add dish from the database [menu editor]
  • F8 ■ Broadcast to customer screens [menu editor]
  • F9 ■ Save date into active template [menu editor]
  • [1], [2], [3] ... [+] ■ Выбор активного шаблона [menu editor]
  • CTRL + Z ■ Clear active template [menu editor]
  • CTRL + 0 ■ System information [about]
  • F11 ■ Help & manuals [about]
  • CTRL + L ■ Dark / light theme toggler [global]
  •   ,     ■ Customer screen #1 [menu editor]
  •   .     ■ Customer screen #2 [menu editor]

MENU EDITOR   ► SETTINGS

  • Show/hide help tooltips for operator
  • Show/hide right side flyout menu with hotkeys
  • Show/hide version of software
  • Show/hide path to XLSX file
  • Turn off/on effects and animation [ beta ]

SETTINGS APPLIED IMMEDIATELY AFTER CLICKING TOGGLES

!!!! DANGER ZONE !!!!

Import with a recap

C:\xampp\htdocs\app\database\2base.xlsx

C:\Apache24\htdocs\app\database\2base.xlsx



Hover to see the details

v0.98+ [2026] / Node.js 23.7 / Webpack 5.98 / PHP 8.2 / PSQL 14 ╠
